innateAbility.name: Glacial Guard
innateAbility.description: Grants the Maiden a physical damage barrier corresponding to the mana cost spent on abilities.

abilities.name: Crystal Nova
abilities.description: Damages and applies movement speed slow to all enemy units in the area-targeted location.

abilities.name: Frostbite
abilities.description: Encases an enemy unit in ice. Applies damage over time while prohibiting movement and attack.

abilities.name: Arcane Aura
abilities.description: Grants additional mana regeneration to allied units on the map.Grants a greater bonus to allied units closer to the Maiden.

abilities.name: Crystal Clone
abilities.description: Creates a Crystal Clone of Rylai in her place while sliding to the area-targeted direction and disjointing incoming projectiles.

abilities.name: Freezing Field
abilities.description: Surrounds Crystal Maiden with random icy explosions that slow all enemy units and deal massive damage within the radius.

abilities.name: Stop Freezing Field
abilities.description: Rylai commands the Freezing Field to halt as she wishes.She can now move, albeit slower, cast other abilities and attack during Freezing Field. Can still be interrupted by enemies.

talents.right: +0.2 Glacial Guard Mana Cost to Barrier Factor
